6-7.label: 6–7 years
6-7.vocabulary: Everyday objects only (fingers, apples, balls, pencils)

8-9.label: 8–9 years
8-9.vocabulary: Concrete school-life words (friends, games, home, food, animals)

10-11.label: 10–11 years
10-11.vocabulary: School subjects, nature; one jargon word allowed if explained inline

12-15.label: 12–15 years
12-15.vocabulary: Subject-specific terms allowed if briefly explained inline
